name: Mahmoud El-Tohamy

projects.title: MoneySphere - Personal Finance Tracker
projects.description: Won 1st place in the ITI branch-level hackathon by taking a Personal Finance Tracker from idea to a deployed MVP in under 24 hours.

projects.title: Pharma - Clinic Management System
projects.description: Developed a full-stack clinic system with role-based access; implemented an end-to-end appointment workflow with a live doctor queue and admin analytics.

projects.title: Sonesta - Hotel Management System
projects.description: Implemented a full-stack hotel management system with role-based dashboards for 4 user roles, API authentication with Sanctum, and analytics.

projects.title: Vue 3 Shop - E-Commerce Storefront
projects.description: Built a responsive storefront with reactive state management, interactive cart, and a 60fps pure-CSS 3D animation system on product cards.

projects.title: Quizzy - Quiz Management Web App
projects.description: Engineered a quiz engine supporting 15+ questions per session with automated 100-point scoring and dynamic question rendering.

projects.title: Chefio - Full-Stack Recipe Sharing Platform
projects.description: Designed and developed the front-end for a recipe sharing platform with discovery, social interactions, and advanced filtered search.

services.title: Front-End Development
services.description: Building scalable, high-performance web applications using React.js, Next.js, Angular, and Vue.js with responsive design.

services.title: Back-End Development
services.description: Developing robust APIs and server-side logic using Node.js, Express.js, PHP, Laravel, and Django REST Framework.

services.title: Database Design & Management
services.description: Designing and managing databases utilizing MongoDB, MySQL, and PostgreSQL for efficient data storage and retrieval.

services.title: Instructor & Training
services.description: Delivering programming and front-end development courses, mentoring students, and teaching web fundamentals.

aboutpara: Full Stack Developer with hands-on experience building scalable, high-performance web applications using Next.js, React.js, TypeScript, Node.js, and MongoDB. Currently completing the ITI 9-Month Open Source Program following an NTI MEAN Stack government scholarship. Combines solid engineering fundamentals with real-world teaching experience, having trained 100+ students in Programming and Front-End Development through government-backed initiatives.

experiences.position: Open Source App Dev Trainee at ITI
experiences.bullets: Hands-on projects across Node.js, React.js, Angular, Vue.js, PHP, Laravel, Python, MongoDB, and MySQL, Agile, Docker, and Generative AI practices.
Delivered a 24-hour foundational Front-End Development course to 10+ university students from non-technical backgrounds, Taught web fundamentals.

experiences.position: MEAN Stack Web Dev Trainee at NTI
experiences.bullets: 180+ hours covering MongoDB, Express.js, Angular, and Node.js, Built REST APIs with authentication and middleware, and Angular applications.
Taught two summer camp groups (60+ students total) over 6-day immersive sessions, Delivered the 5 Stages of Design Thinking.

education.universityPara: Bachelor’s Degree in Computer Science, Faculty of Computers and Artificial Intelligence
